title: Non-Amazon Scrape Rescue Thread - MiracleSuit to Bloomingdale's AQUA

metadata.purpose: Record this Codex thread's scrape coordination, rescue attempts, blockers, output counts, S3 sync, and git wrap-up.

messages.text: Requested MiracleSuit full product-page scrape using the scraping procedure, with care not to get flagged as a cybersecurity risk.

Scraped MiracleSuit, found only 44 image rows and initially reported too few qualified rows because ordered size extraction was missing. Fixed scrape_miraclesuit_reviews.py to parse size from Yotpo custom fields and text such as Size 10. Corrected existing MiracleSuit output to 44 rows, 8 rows with size, 8 rows with measurements, and 8 qualified rows. A full rerun hit HTTP 429 and was stopped; MiracleSuit was added to the revisit plan.
Asked why there were so few qualified rows and said the previous result was wrong.
Acknowledged the error, corrected the size parser, updated MiracleSuit summary with problems encountered and a revisit plan, and documented the 429 cooldown requirement.
Asked for a way to mark errors/problems and write a triage plan, then asked which site should be next while avoiding redundancy across concurrent Codex chats.

Created and maintained data-pipelines/non-amazon/docs/scrape_triage_plan.md. Added coordination rules requiring active claim checks, claim files before starting sites, and stopping on 429/captcha/auth/WAF. Added active/revisit/avoid entries for MiracleSuit, SwimOutlet, Andie Swim, 686, Kenneth Cole, Alloy, prior-429 sites, and other concurrent work.

Attempted SwimOutlet next. Added scrape_swimoutlet_reviews.py using public Shopify catalog and Okendo endpoints. A targeted seed product check showed Okendo review image rows with size/color from productVariantName. The full catalog attempt hit HTTP 429 on products.json page 8 after 1,750 products, so the run stopped and SwimOutlet was marked blocked_rate_limited with a revisit plan.

Attempted Goelia next. Added scrape_goelia1995_reviews.py. Checked 1,761 Shopify products and public Klaviyo review endpoints. Klaviyo widgets returned no active review widgets and batch summaries returned no public review counts or rows. Marked goelia1995_com completed_no_public_review_feed.

Attempted Andie Swim. Added scrape_andieswim_reviews.py. Public Okendo endpoints exposed media, ordered size, height, bra size, and body attributes. A 60-product smoke wrote 110 image rows and 106 qualified rows. A follow-up store-level run hit HTTP 429 on Shopify products.json page 2, so it stopped and Andie was marked blocked_rate_limited with a store-feed-only revisit plan.

Checked Kenneth Cole. Public Yotpo had about 3,006 reviews, but sparse aggregate page checks found zero review image attachments. Marked kennethcole_com completed_no_public_review_images and documented that no intake CSV rewrite was useful.

Checked 686. Public Yotpo app key kViLjR6MjnMQbylS5UUGhdBwohd5m1zTLhOKuBnX exposed about 22,704 aggregate reviews and product-level reviews for an in-scope women's pant. Aggregate pages and product reviewsMedia returned zero customer image attachments. Marked 686_com completed_no_public_review_images.

Converted Bloomingdale's AQUA local workbook instead of live-probing. Added convert_bloomingdales_aqua_workbook.py to flatten Bazaarvoice review-photo rows from Bloomingdales_Aqua.xlsx into the current intake schema. Fixed duplicate inflation from repeated BigImage/Page_URL groups. Final output: 399 rows, 175 distinct images, 201 distinct product URLs, 285 rows with size, 177 with measurements, and 166 qualified rows.

Added docs for this thread's site work: miraclesuit_scrape_2026-05-05.md, swimoutlet_scrape_2026-05-05.md, goelia1995_scrape_2026-05-05.md, andieswim_scrape_2026-05-05.md, kennethcole_scrape_2026-05-05.md, 686_scrape_2026-05-05.md, and bloomingdales_aqua_scrape_2026-05-05.md. Refreshed aggregate reports after each major output update.
Said this chat thread is done and requested updates to git, S3, and the transcripts table.

Ran S3 sync directly with aws --profile fwm s3 sync C:\Users\bsing\OneDrive\Documents\Projects\FWM_Data s3://fwm-scraping-data-briannasinger because the bash helper failed on a malformed .env service-role line. Verified S3 contains Bloomingdale's AQUA workbook, current intake CSV, and summary JSON. Prepared this focused transcript JSON for upload to public.codex_chat_transcripts.

blockers: Several live Shopify catalogs returned HTTP 429, including MiracleSuit, SwimOutlet, and Andie Swim. These were stopped immediately and moved to triage rather than retried aggressively.
Kenneth Cole and 686 exposed public Yotpo text reviews but no public customer review-image attachments in sampled endpoints.
Goelia exposed a public Klaviyo setup but no active public review widget/feed with review rows.
next_steps: Retry Andie Swim later with a store-feed-only Okendo mode that avoids full Shopify catalog pagination.
Retry SwimOutlet later with slower delay and checkpoint/resume if still needed.
Avoid prior-429 sites until cooldown and avoid no-media Yotpo sites unless customer photos become visible.
